name: Quarterback Crunch Peanut Butter Bars
recipeIngredient: 3 cups bite-sized crispy wheat squares cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 13x9-inch pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cereals, cracker snacks, and pretzel sticks.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine corn syrup, sugar, brown sugar, and margarine.
4. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat; stir in peanut butter until well blended.
6. Pour the peanut butter mixture over the cereal mixture and mix well to coat.
7. Press the mixture into the greased pan.
8. Cool slightly; refrigerate 1 to 2 hours or until firm.
9. Cut into bars.
Tip: For an intense peanut butter flavor, mini butter-flavored cracker snacks with peanut butter filling can be substituted for the mini butter-flavored cracker snacks.
